zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Brugge於1389年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾迪爾爾斯特時，他的父親Sir Thomas Brugge34歲，母親Alice Berkeley10歲。他和Alice Apperley至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1436年9月2日享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Brugge于1389年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾迪爾爾斯特时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Brugge34岁，母亲Alice Berkeley10岁。他和Alice Apperley至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1436年9月2日享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brugge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch (Van der Brugge): topographic name for someone living near a brug ‘bridge’.
Flemish and Dutch: habitational name from Bruges.
North German (Brügge): variant of Bruck or a habitational name from any of several places called Brügge.

variants.name: Bruck
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Naftali, Eliahu, Hershel, Meyer, Ruvim, Shloime, Yoav.

German (also Brück): topographic name for someone who lived near a bridge, or an occupational name for a bridge keeper or toll collector on a bridge, from Middle High German bruck(e) ‘bridge’. Bruck remained the Bavarian and Austrian form, reflected in placenames such as Innsbruck, whereas in central and northern Germany Brück(e) was the regular and ultimately standard form, as for example in the placename Osnabrück. Switzerland has both forms. See also Brueck .
Jewish (from Poland and Belarus): from Polish, Belorussian, or Yiddish bruk ‘pavement’, possibly a metonymic occupational name for a paver.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Brugge was born in 1389, in Deerhurst, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Brugge, was 34 and his mother, Alice Berkeley, was 10. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Alice Apperley. He died on 2 September 1436, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Brugge est né en 1389, à Deerhurst, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Brugge, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Alice Berkeley, avait 10 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Alice Apperley. Il est décédé le 2 septembre 1436, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Brugge 1389 in Deerhurst, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Brugge 34 und seine Mutter Alice Berkeley 10. Er hatte mit Alice Apperley mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. September 1436 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Brugge è nato il nel 1389 nel Deerhurst, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Brugge, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Alice Berkeley, aveva 10 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Alice Apperley. Morì il 2 settembre 1436, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Bruggeが1389年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディールハルストで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Bruggeは34歳，母Alice Berkeleyは10歳であった。彼はAlice Apperleyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1436年9月2日に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Brugge(이)가 1389년 영국 그루스스터실르 디후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Brugge(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Berkeley(은)는 10세였다. 그는 Alice Apperley(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1436년 9월 2일 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Brugge nasceu em 1389, em Deerhurst, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Brugge, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Alice Berkeley, tinha 10 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Alice Apperley. Ele faleceu em 2 de setembro de 1436, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Brugge родился в 1389 г. в местности дирурст, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Brugge было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Berkeley, 10. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Alice Apperley. Он умер 2 сентября 1436 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Brugge nació en 1389, en Deerhurst, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Brugge, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Alice Berkeley, tenía 10 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Alice Apperley. Murió el 2 de septiembre de 1436, a la edad de 47 años.
